prompt:
Schema: workers(id,name,plant_code,role,hire_date,hourly_rate); shifts(id,worker_id,shift_date,start_time,end_time,plant_code); products(sku,name,category,unit_cost); production_runs(id,sku,plant_code,run_date,units_produced,defect_count). Question: List all workers at plant_code APEX-02.
SQL:
expected: SELECT id, name FROM workers WHERE plant_code = 'APEX-02';

prompt:
Schema: workers(id,name,plant_code,role,hire_date,hourly_rate); shifts(id,worker_id,shift_date,start_time,end_time,plant_code); products(sku,name,category,unit_cost); production_runs(id,sku,plant_code,run_date,units_produced,defect_count). Question: Count shifts worked by worker 17 in February 2026.
SQL:
expected: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shifts WHERE worker_id = 17 AND shift_date BETWEEN '2026-02-01' AND '2026-02-28';

prompt:
Schema: workers(id,name,plant_code,role,hire_date,hourly_rate); shifts(id,worker_id,shift_date,start_time,end_time,plant_code); products(sku,name,category,unit_cost); production_runs(id,sku,plant_code,run_date,units_produced,defect_count). Question: Sum of units_produced for sku SKU-2200 across all plants.
SQL:
expected: SELECT SUM(units_produced) FROM production_runs WHERE sku = 'SKU-2200';

prompt:
Schema: workers(id,name,plant_code,role,hire_date,hourly_rate); shifts(id,worker_id,shift_date,start_time,end_time,plant_code); products(sku,name,category,unit_cost); production_runs(id,sku,plant_code,run_date,units_produced,defect_count). Question: Average hourly_rate per role at plant APEX-01.
SQL:
expected: SELECT role, AVG(hourly_rate) FROM workers WHERE plant_code = 'APEX-01' GROUP BY role;

prompt:
Schema: workers(id,name,plant_code,role,hire_date,hourly_rate); shifts(id,worker_id,shift_date,start_time,end_time,plant_code); products(sku,name,category,unit_cost); production_runs(id,sku,plant_code,run_date,units_produced,defect_count). Question: Defect rate per plant for runs in March 2026.
SQL:
expected: SELECT plant_code, SUM(defect_count) * 1.0 / SUM(units_produced) AS defect_rate FROM production_runs WHERE run_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31' GROUP BY plant_code;

prompt:
Schema: workers(id,name,plant_code,role,hire_date,hourly_rate); shifts(id,worker_id,shift_date,start_time,end_time,plant_code); products(sku,name,category,unit_cost); production_runs(id,sku,plant_code,run_date,units_produced,defect_count). Question: List products in category GASKET.
SQL:
expected: SELECT sku, name FROM products WHERE category = 'GASKET';

prompt:
Schema: workers(id,name,plant_code,role,hire_date,hourly_rate); shifts(id,worker_id,shift_date,start_time,end_time,plant_code); products(sku,name,category,unit_cost); production_runs(id,sku,plant_code,run_date,units_produced,defect_count). Question: Top 3 SKUs by total units_produced in 2026.
SQL:
expected: SELECT sku, SUM(units_produced) AS total FROM production_runs WHERE run_date >= '2026-01-01' GROUP BY sku ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 3;

prompt:
Schema: workers(id,name,plant_code,role,hire_date,hourly_rate); shifts(id,worker_id,shift_date,start_time,end_time,plant_code); products(sku,name,category,unit_cost); production_runs(id,sku,plant_code,run_date,units_produced,defect_count). Question: Workers with role MACHINIST whose hourly_rate exceeds 40.
SQL:
expected: SELECT id, name, hourly_rate FROM workers WHERE role = 'MACHINIST' AND hourly_rate > 40;

prompt:
Schema: workers(id,name,plant_code,role,hire_date,hourly_rate); shifts(id,worker_id,shift_date,start_time,end_time,plant_code); products(sku,name,category,unit_cost); production_runs(id,sku,plant_code,run_date,units_produced,defect_count). Question: Plants with fewer than 50 workers.
SQL:
expected: SELECT plant_code, COUNT(*) AS headcount FROM workers GROUP BY plant_code HAVING COUNT(*) < 50;

prompt:
Schema: workers(id,name,plant_code,role,hire_date,hourly_rate); shifts(id,worker_id,shift_date,start_time,end_time,plant_code); products(sku,name,category,unit_cost); production_runs(id,sku,plant_code,run_date,units_produced,defect_count). Question: Total payroll for shifts in April 2026 at plant APEX-02.
SQL:
expected: SELECT SUM((julianday(s.end_time) - julianday(s.start_time)) * 24 * w.hourly_rate) AS payroll FROM shifts s JOIN workers w ON s.worker_id = w.id WHERE s.shift_date BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-04-30' AND s.plant_code = 'APEX-02';

prompt:
Schema: workers(id,name,plant_code,role,hire_date,hourly_rate); shifts(id,worker_id,shift_date,start_time,end_time,plant_code); products(sku,name,category,unit_cost); production_runs(id,sku,plant_code,run_date,units_produced,defect_count). Question: SKUs never produced at plant APEX-03.
SQL:
expected: SELECT sku FROM products WHERE sku NOT IN (SELECT sku FROM production_runs WHERE plant_code = 'APEX-03');

prompt:
Schema: workers(id,name,plant_code,role,hire_date,hourly_rate); shifts(id,worker_id,shift_date,start_time,end_time,plant_code); products(sku,name,category,unit_cost); production_runs(id,sku,plant_code,run_date,units_produced,defect_count). Question: Workers who worked at more than one plant_code.
SQL:
expected: SELECT worker_id FROM shifts GROUP BY worker_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT plant_code) > 1;

prompt:
Schema: workers(id,name,plant_code,role,hire_date,hourly_rate); shifts(id,worker_id,shift_date,start_time,end_time,plant_code); products(sku,name,category,unit_cost); production_runs(id,sku,plant_code,run_date,units_produced,defect_count). Question: Average defects per run by category.
SQL:
expected: SELECT p.category, AVG(r.defect_count) FROM production_runs r JOIN products p ON p.sku = r.sku GROUP BY p.category;

prompt:
Schema: workers(id,name,plant_code,role,hire_date,hourly_rate); shifts(id,worker_id,shift_date,start_time,end_time,plant_code); products(sku,name,category,unit_cost); production_runs(id,sku,plant_code,run_date,units_produced,defect_count). Question: List shifts on 2026-04-10 longer than 9 hours.
SQL:
expected: SELECT id, worker_id FROM shifts WHERE shift_date = '2026-04-10' AND (julianday(end_time) - julianday(start_time)) * 24 > 9;
